description: Report date (YYYY-MM-DD). Primary time dimension for page-level performance.
GA4 property ID (e.g. properties/297809897). Identifies the GA4 account.
Fivetran-generated unique hash ID for the row. Used for deduplication.
Full page URL path including query string parameters (e.g. /collections/all/products/cashews?ref=sale). Identifies the specific landing page or ad slot.
Number of completed ecommerce transactions originating from this page/ad slot.
Fraction of sessions that were not engaged on this page (0.0–1.0). Lower is better.
Number of engaged sessions that included this page.
Average session duration in seconds for sessions that visited this page.
Total number of users (new + returning) who visited this page.
Number of active users who visited this page in the reporting period.
Number of first-time users who landed on this page.
Total sessions that included this page.
Total number of times this page was viewed.
Timestamp when Fivetran last synced this row from the source.
